title: Galt Toys, Baby Puzzles - Jungle, Jigsaw Puzzles for Kids, Ages 18 Months Plus
features: Set of 6 shaped 2-piece jungle animal puzzles
Encourages early matching skills and manual dexterity
Approximate size of puzzles: 12.5 x 15cm (5" x 6")
description: From the manufacturer Galt Toys Baby Puzzles Range Galt Baby Puzzles are the perfect introduction to the playful world of puzzling. Each of our cheery two-piece puzzles feature bright, bold illustrations and large, chunky pieces that are ideal for little hands. Children aged 18 months + will find these fun, educational puzzles inspiring and engaging while they learn valuable lessons through play. Solving puzzles provides a wealth of benefits for very young children including helping to develop early matching skills, problem solving abilities and manual dexterity too. Accessible Puzzles for Young Minds Themes that Enrich and Entertain Our Baby Puzzle range will capture your little one’s imagination, with each set of six featuring a different bright and colourful theme including Farm, Jungle, Pets and Transport. Not only do the adorable designs keep young puzzlers engaged, but the subject matter also helps encourage speech and identification as they develop their vocabulary to recognise and describe each piece. The Perfect First Puzzles When working through these vibrant 2-piece puzzles your child will learn patience and persistence and get a great sense of accomplishment on completing it, boosting their independence and self-esteem, and having a lot of fun in the process. Learn Valuable Lessons Through Play Puzzles offer a wide range of benefits and are great for helping young children to learn key lessons and skills through play. From enhancing cognitive skills and fine motor development, to developing an understanding of each theme these first puzzles are ideal for challenging and entertaining young minds.
